Title: Overview page renders product summary
Preconditions: User has completed checkout info and navigated to overview
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/checkout-overview; 2. Verify page URL matches; 3. Verify 'Checkout' or 'Overview' heading is visible; 4. Verify product prices displayed in bold
Expected_Result: Overview page displays heading and product price information correctly

Title: @smoke Overview page renders product summary with price
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/checkout-overview; 2. Verify heading visible; 3. Verify prices displayed
Expected_Result: Overview page displays heading and price summary with product details

Title: Overview page renders product summary
Preconditions: User is on checkout overview page
Steps: 1. Verify page renders; 2. Verify product information visible; 3. Verify pricing information visible
Expected_Result: Product summary section displays all ordered items with details

Title: Payment shipping and totals sections are visible
Preconditions: User is on checkout overview page
Steps: 1. Locate 'Payment Information' text; 2. Verify it is visible
Expected_Result: Payment Information section is displayed on page

Title: Payment shipping and totals sections are visible
Preconditions: User is on checkout overview page
Steps: 1. Locate 'Shipping Information' text; 2. Verify it is visible
Expected_Result: Shipping Information section is displayed on page

Title: Payment shipping and totals sections are visible
Preconditions: User is on checkout overview page
Steps: 1. Locate price total section; 2. Verify 'Item Total' 'Tax' and 'Total' labels visible
Expected_Result: Price total section displays all required summary lines

Title: Grand total follows item total plus tax formula
Preconditions: User is on checkout overview page with known cart items
Steps: 1. Capture Item Total value; 2. Capture Tax value; 3. Capture Grand Total value; 4. Verify Grand Total = Item Total + Tax
Expected_Result: Grand Total calculation is correct and equals Item Total plus Tax

Title: Overview page displays read-only order data
Preconditions: User is on checkout overview page
Steps: 1. Search for editable checkout form fields; 2. Verify no 'Ex. John' or 'Ex. Doe' placeholders; 3. Verify no email input
Expected_Result: Page contains no editable checkout form inputs; all data is read-only

Title: Cancel exits overview flow
Preconditions: User is on checkout overview page
Expected_Result: User is redirected away from /checkout-overview page; checkout flow is aborted

Title: Finish completes order and opens completion page
Preconditions: User is on checkout overview page
Steps: 1. Click Finish button; 2. Wait for navigation
Expected_Result: User is redirected to /ecommerce/checkout-complete page; order is completed

Title: @smoke Finish button completes order and shows completion page
Preconditions: User is on checkout overview page
Steps: 1. Click Finish button; 2. Verify navigation to checkout-complete
Expected_Result: Finish button successfully completes order and navigates to completion page

Title: Overview remains stable when backend fetch fails
Steps: 1. Mock API to return 500 error; 2. Navigate to /ecommerce/checkout-overview; 3. Observe page stability
Expected_Result: Page remains stable with error state or recovery mechanism; no crash occurs

Title: Unauthorized direct access is guarded
Steps: 1. Clear cookies and storage; 2. Navigate to /ecommerce/checkout-overview
Expected_Result: User is redirected to login page; unauthorized access is blocked

Title: @regression Payment section shows required info labels
Preconditions: User is on checkout overview page
Steps: 1. Locate Payment Information section; 2. Verify payment details labels visible
Expected_Result: Payment Information section displays required labels and information

Title: @regression Item count in overview matches cart item count
Preconditions: User is on checkout overview page
Steps: 1. Count named items in overview; 2. Count price-like elements; 3. Verify at least one item element
Expected_Result: Overview displays at least one item detail matching cart contents

Title: @regression Overview page title and breadcrumb is correct
Preconditions: User is on checkout overview page
Steps: 1. Verify page heading is visible; 2. Verify heading text is meaningful
Expected_Result: Page heading is visible and indicates checkout/overview context correctly
